title: Spicy Korean-Style Vegetable Dosirak
description: A flavorful and spicy vegetarian dosirak recipe inspired by Korean street food.
instructions: Cook the thick rice according to the package instructions.
In a large pan, heat 1 tsp of sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add the kimchi, Korean chili flakes, and dosirak spice blend. Stir well to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the flavors are well combined.
To assemble the dosirak, place a scoop of cooked rice in the bottom of a bowl.
Add the spicy vegetable mixture on top of the rice.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
